hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); case "$f" in */docs/*) ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; cd /Users/sbarber/git/Plant-Tracer/webapp && output=$(poetry run sphinx-build -W --keep-going -b html docs docs/_build/html 2>&1); rc=$?; if [ $rc -ne 0 ]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Sphinx docs build warnings/errors after editing %s:\n%s"}}' "$f" "$output"; fi
